params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: ★★ perplexity h2_end_stream config fix verify. Per #759 etap.log audit: engine fired V7-D envelope correctly at 17:53:05 (http1_size=1509, response_type=perplexity_sse_v7c_public, is_h2=1) BUT h2_end_stream=2 (delayed END_STREAM) was set in DB. This means engine sent DATA frame with END_STREAM=0, waiting for VTS to close stream later. Since engine intercepted (server response never came), VTS NEVER closed stream → SPA waits indefinitely → answer area never renders. DB UPDATE: h2_end_stream 2→1 (immediate END_STREAM on engine response DATA frame). reload_services SUCCESS. Engine run_id 20260507-174759-93691 (FIX-G+F+E active). Expected: V7-D envelope (1218 bytes with 9 fields including frontend_context_uuid echo) now stream-closes properly → SPA's React answer-block component mounts → Korean warning rendered. RRN decode absent (S2 holds).

notes: perplexity h2_end_stream fix — root cause was H2 stream never closed (DB config 2=delayed). Now 1=immediate END_STREAM. Combined with V7-D field gap closure should unblock SPA rendering.
